Open Data for Research

Datasets & Methodology

Access satellite data sources, spectral indices, GEE code snippets, and downloadable datasets for your own environmental research.

Free for research use
GeoJSON, CSV, JSON formats
GEE collection IDs included
Sentinel-2 L2A
ESA Copernicus
Sentinel-1 SAR
ESA Copernicus
JRC Global Surface Water
EC Joint Research Centre
Landsat 8/9 OLI
USGS/NASA
FABDEM / SRTM
University of Bristol / NASA

Sentinel-2 L2A

ESA Copernicus

10m (RGB, NIR), 20m (SWIR)

Primary dataset for optical analysis of water bodies and land cover change detection. 5-day revisit time enables frequent monitoring.

Spectral Bands

B2 (Blue)B3 (Green)B4 (Red)B8 (NIR)B11 (SWIR1)B12 (SWIR2)

Applications

  • Water quality monitoring
  • NDTI calculation
  • Turbidity mapping
  • Encroachment detection
Temporal Coverage
2015-Present
GEE Collection
COPERNICUS/S2_SR_HARMONIZED
NodiWatch

AI-Powered Satellite Surveillance for Bangladesh River Ecosystems

© 2026 Team AlphaVerse. Eco-Tech Hackathon.

Platform

  • Pollution Monitoring
  • Encroachment Detection
  • Erosion Forecasting
  • Evidence Reports

Beneficiaries

  • Dept. of Environment (DoE)
  • National River Conservation Commission (NRCC)
  • Bangladesh Water Development Board (BWDB)
  • Environmental Courts
  • Bangladesh Bank (Green Banking)

Team AlphaVerse

  • Ahmmad Nur Swapnil
